description: Webpack 5 multi-chunk e-commerce behavioral tracker: 5 files (runtime + 4 chunks), 30 webpack modules total. The runtime provides a shared module cache (__webpack_require__.c) that all chunks use for cross-chunk calls. The app chunk has 9 tracker modules communicating through an event bus (vendors.js module 0). The analytics chunk processes events through sampling → batching → deflate → throttle. The sender chunk signs payloads with HMAC (key: tracker_prod_2025_v2) and sends via XHR with retry. Agent must navigate webpack module IDs across chunks, understand the event-driven architecture, and trace the full data flow from user interaction through to network send.

files.name: runtime.js
files.purpose: Webpack 5 runtime bootstrap: provides __webpack_require__ (module loader), __webpack_register__ (module registration), __webpack_chunk_load__ (JSONP chunk loader), __webpack_get_module__ (cross-chunk module access). The shared module cache __webpack_require__c enables all cross-chunk communication.

files.name: vendors.js
files.purpose: Vendor chunk: 6 shared utility modules. Module 0=EventEmitter (on/off/emit/once), 1=tiny-md5 (request dedup), 2=data-validator (isObject/isArray/deepEqual), 3=base64-codec, 4=debounce-throttle, 5=cookie-helper. Module 0 (EventEmitter) is the foundation of the event-driven architecture — all tracker events flow through its instances.

files.name: app.js
files.purpose: App chunk: 9 tracker modules. Module 10=tracker-init (entry: creates EventEmitter instance as __TRACKER_EVENT_BUS__, sets __TRACKER_CONFIG__), 11=page-view (url/referrer/title, SPA history pushState hook, visibilitychange), 12=click-heatmap (xpath, offsetX/Y, debounce 500ms), 13=scroll-depth (25/50/75/100% milestones, throttle 200ms), 14=form-watcher (focus/blur timing, field duration, abandonment detection), 15=cart-tracker (add/remove/update, state snapshot), 16=session-manager (sessionId, heartbeat 30s, idle tracking), 17=error-catcher (window.onerror + unhandledrejection), 18=user-identity (cookie-based userId, first visit timestamp). All trackers emit events through __TRACKER_EVENT_BUS__.

files.name: analytics.js
files.purpose: Analytics chunk: 5 event processing modules. Module 20=event-aggregator (extends EventEmitter, dedup by id+ts, max 100 cache, auto-flush at 10 events), 21=sampling-engine (deterministic hash-based sampling, default 10%, whitelist/blacklist), 22=batch-builder (batch packing up to 50, MD5 batch ID, auto-flush every 5s, feeds __BATCH_QUEUE__), 23=dimension-builder (flattens event into uid/sid/url/device/client_ts/event_type dimensions), 24=throttle-controller (token bucket: 30 max tokens, 3/sec refill).

files.name: sender.js
files.purpose: Network chunk: 4 transport modules. Module 30=transport-xhr (XHR POST, 10s timeout), 31=transport-beacon (sendBeacon for unload), 32=retry-queue (exponential backoff 1→2→4→8→16s, max 5 retries, feeds __RETRY_QUEUE__), 33=payload-builder (HMAC-SHA256 signing with key=tracker_prod_2025_v2, base64 encoding, MD5 checksum).

crossFileDependencies.mechanism: globalThis event bus — indirect event-driven coupling

sharedResources.name: __webpack_require__c
sharedResources.usedIn: ALL chunks — foundation of cross-chunk module access

dataFlow: USER INTERACTION (click/scroll/form/cart/error/page_view) → app tracker modules emit events via __TRACKER_EVENT_BUS__ → analytics module 20 (event-aggregator) deduplicates and caches → analytics module 21 (sampling-engine) applies 10% hash-based sampling → analytics module 22 (batch-builder) packs up to 50 events, generates MD5 batch ID, pushes to __BATCH_QUEUE__ → analytics module 24 (throttle-controller) token-bucket rate-limits to 3/sec → sender module 33 (payload-builder) builds final payload with dimensions, base64 encodes, HMAC-SHA256 signs (key: tracker_prod_2025_v2) → sender module 32 (retry-queue) sends via sender module 30 (transport-xhr) with exponential backoff → POST https://track.example.com/api/v3/batch → on failure/unload: sender module 31 (transport-beacon) fallback

filePurposes.runtime.js: Webpack 5 runtime: module system (__webpack_require__), chunk loader, shared module cache — infrastructure, not business logic
filePurposes.vendors.js: Shared utility chunk: EventEmitter (event system foundation), tiny-md5, validator, base64-codec, debounce/throttle, cookie-helper
filePurposes.app.js: Tracker modules: init (entry), page-view, click-heatmap, scroll-depth, form-watcher, cart-tracker, session-manager, error-catcher, user-identity — all communicate via event bus
filePurposes.analytics.js: Processing pipeline: event-aggregator (dedup+cache), sampling-engine (10% hash-based), batch-builder (MD5 batches), dimension-builder, throttle-controller (token bucket 3/sec)
filePurposes.sender.js: Network transport: XHR + beacon, retry queue (5 attempts, exponential backoff), payload builder with HMAC-SHA256 signing (key: tracker_prod_2025_v2)

expectedAnswers.entryFunction: module 10 (tracker-init) — creates event bus and config

apiEndpoints.purpose: Submit batched behavioral tracking events with HMAC signature
